data.name: Hentai Tales: Academy's Record
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在完成棘手的難題時享受一個感性的故事！
使用板上的所有正方形連接數字
完成難題後，您將解鎖性感的新圖像和故事的下一部分！
您能完成每個難題並結識所有女孩嗎？

故事背景

這家私立學校成立於1987年，以其獨特的“青年連續教育模型”引發了日本教育社區的廣泛討論，並被稱為“成人高中”或“第二青春期的搖籃”。
在這所學校，正在發生未知的欺凌行為...

人物

Akagi Misaki：

作為一群壞女孩的絕對核心，她浪費了她的青年時代，將規則視為裝飾，而她對生活在現在的極端思考使她陷入了每一次興奮和危險的邊緣。

鈴木Ayaka：

她是一個富裕家庭的女兒，她看起來優雅而體面，但掩蓋了一顆計算的心。她將所有人際關係都視為棋盤，她本人是控制一切的國際象棋棋盤。

Yano Shizuka：

當她與姐妹群體分開時，害羞的女孩遮住了眼睛，就像一朵褪色的花一樣，但是當她被最好的朋友包圍時，她以令人難以置信的勇氣和活力綻放，好像她具有矛盾的雙重性格。

特徵

  • 20個美麗女孩的性感和色情圖像。
  • 一個夢幻般的色情故事，有著獨特的個性。
  • 如果您只想欣賞這個故事，就可以跳過難題。 （在難題期間按Enter）。
  • CG畫廊模式。 （完成拼圖後，單擊CG旁邊的左右按鈕）。

  • 處理器: 4GHz+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Tales: Academy's Record
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

This private school, founded in 1987, has sparked widespread discussion in the Japanese education community for its unique "youth continuation education model" and is known as the "high school for adults" or the "cradle of the second adolescence."
And in this school, unknown bullying is happening...

Characters

Akagi Misaki:

As the absolute core of a group of bad girls, she squanders her youth, regards rules as mere decorations, and her extreme thinking of living in the present drives her to the edge of every excitement and danger.

Suzuki Ayaka:

The daughter of a wealthy family, she appears elegant and decent but hides a calculating heart. She regards all interpersonal relationships as a chessboard, and she herself is the chess player who controls everything.

Yano Shizuka:

The shy girl with black hair covering her eyes is like a faded flower when she is separated from the sister group, but when she is surrounded by her best friends, she blooms with incredible courage and vitality, as if she has a contradictory dual personality.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
